# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Path to a program.
CCACHE_BINARY:FILEPATH=CCACHE_BINARY-NOTFOUND

//The directory relative to CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX where Eigen3Config.cmake
// is installed
CMAKEPACKAGE_INSTALL_DIR:PATH=share/eigen3/cmake

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-12

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-12

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD:UNINITIALIZED=17

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-12

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-12

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// all build types.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

CMAKE_NM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/nm

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJCOPY:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/objcopy

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJDUMP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/objdump

CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil

CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=

CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=tensorflow-lite

CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_TWEAK:STATIC=

CMAKE_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ranlib

CMAKE_READELF:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/readelf

// during all build types.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Confu-style dependencies binary directory
CONFU_DEPENDENCIES_BINARY_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/deps

//Confu-style dependencies source directory
CONFU_DEPENDENCIES_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/deps

//Build cpuinfo micro-benchmarks
CPUINFO_BUILD_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Build cpuinfo mock tests
CPUINFO_BUILD_MOCK_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build pkg-config manifest
CPUINFO_BUILD_PKG_CONFIG:BOOL=ON

//Build command-line tools
CPUINFO_BUILD_TOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//Build cpuinfo unit tests
CPUINFO_BUILD_UNIT_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Type of cpuinfo library (shared, static, or default) to build
CPUINFO_LIBRARY_TYPE:STRING=default

//Minimum logging level (info with lower severity will be ignored)
CPUINFO_LOG_LEVEL:STRING=default

//Log errors, warnings, and information to stdout/stderr
CPUINFO_LOG_TO_STDIO:BOOL=ON

//Type of runtime library (shared, static, or default) to use
CPUINFO_RUNTIME_TYPE:STRING=default

//CPUINFO source directory
CPUINFO_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/cpuinfo

//Toggles the building of the Eigen Blas library
EIGEN_BUILD_BLAS:BOOL=OFF

//Build benchmark suite
EIGEN_BUILD_BTL:BOOL=OFF

//Enables the creation of EigenConfig.cmake and related files
EIGEN_BUILD_CMAKE_PACKAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Toggles the building of the Eigen demos
EIGEN_BUILD_DEMOS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable creation of Eigen documentation
EIGEN_BUILD_DOC:BOOL=OFF

//Toggles the building of the included Eigen LAPACK library
EIGEN_BUILD_LAPACK:BOOL=OFF

//Build pkg-config .pc file for Eigen
EIGEN_BUILD_PKGCONFIG:BOOL=OFF

//Build sparse benchmark suite
EIGEN_BUILD_SPBENCH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable creation of Eigen tests.
EIGEN_BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable row-major matrix storage
EIGEN_DEFAULT_TO_ROW_MAJOR:BOOL=OFF

//Disabled Fortran
EIGEN_DISABLED_FORTRAN_COMPILER_CHECK:BOOL=ON

//Leaves tests in the all target, needed by ctest for automatic
// building.
EIGEN_LEAVE_TEST_IN_ALL_TARGET:BOOL=OFF

//Disable test splitting.
EIGEN_SPLIT_LARGE_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable triSYCL test
EIGEN_SYCL_TRISYCL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable 32-bit instructions test
EIGEN_TEST_32BIT:BOOL=OFF

//Disable AltiVec test.
EIGEN_TEST_ALTIVEC:BOOL=OFF

//Disable AVX test.
EIGEN_TEST_AVX:BOOL=OFF

//Disable AVX512 test.
EIGEN_TEST_AVX512:BOOL=OFF

//Disable tests of C++11 features.
EIGEN_TEST_CXX11:BOOL=OFF

//Disable F16C test.
EIGEN_TEST_F16C:BOOL=OFF

//Disable FMA test.
EIGEN_TEST_FMA:BOOL=OFF

//Disable MSA test.
EIGEN_TEST_MSA:BOOL=OFF

//Disable NEON test.
EIGEN_TEST_NEON:BOOL=OFF

//Disable NEON64 test.
EIGEN_TEST_NEON64:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Qt support in tests.
EIGEN_TEST_NOQT:BOOL=ON

//Disable exceptions test
EIGEN_TEST_NO_EXCEPTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable alignment test
EIGEN_TEST_NO_EXPLICIT_ALIGNMENT:BOOL=OFF

//Disable vectorization
EIGEN_TEST_NO_EXPLICIT_VECTORIZATION:BOOL=OFF

//Disable OpenMP test.
EIGEN_TEST_OPENMP:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSE2 test.
EIGEN_TEST_SSE2:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSE3 test.
EIGEN_TEST_SSE3:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSE4.1 test.
EIGEN_TEST_SSE4_1:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSE4.2 test.
EIGEN_TEST_SSE4_2:BOOL=OFF

//Disable SSSE3 test.
EIGEN_TEST_SSSE3:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Sycl test
EIGEN_TEST_SYCL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable VSX test.
EIGEN_TEST_VSX:BOOL=OFF

//Disable X87 instructions test
EIGEN_TEST_X87:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Z13 test.
EIGEN_TEST_Z13:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Z14 test.
EIGEN_TEST_Z14:BOOL=OFF

Eigen3_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/_deps/eigen-build

//Value Computed by CMake
Eigen3_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Eigen3_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/eigen

//Source directory for the CMake project.
FARMHASH_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/farmhash

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for cpuinfo
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_CPUINFO:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/cpuinfo

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for eigen
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_EIGEN:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/eigen

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for farmhash
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_FARMHASH:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/farmhash

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for fft2d
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_FFT2D:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for flatbuffers
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_FLATBUFFERS:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/flatbuffers

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for gemmlowp
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_GEMMLOWP:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/gemmlowp

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for ml_dtypes
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_ML_DTYPES:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/ml_dtypes

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for protobuf
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_PROTOBUF:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for ruy
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_RUY:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/ruy

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for xnnpack
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_XNNPACK:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/xnnpack

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of fft2d
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_FFT2D:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of protobuf
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_PROTOBUF:BOOL=OFF

//Found FF2D
FFT2D_FOUND:BOOL=TRUE

//FFT2D include dirs
FFT2D_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/fft2d

//FFT2D libraries
FFT2D_LIBRARIES:STRING=fft2d_alloc;fft2d_fft4f2d;fft2d_fftsg;fft2d_fftsg2d;fft2d_fftsg3d;fft2d_shrtdct

//fft2d source
FFT2D_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/fft2d

//Enable the build of flatbenchmark.
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the build of c++17 test target. "
//\n       Requirements: Clang6, GCC7, MSVC2017 (_MSC_VER >= 1914)
//  or higher.
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_CPP17:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the build of the flatbuffers compiler
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_FLATC:BOOL=ON

//Enable the build of flathash
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_FLATHASH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the build of the flatbuffers library
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_FLATLIB:BOOL=ON

//Enable the build of grpctest
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_GRPCTEST:BOOL=OFF

//Run C++ code generator with '--cpp-std c++0x' switch.
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_LEGACY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the build of the flatbuffers shared library
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_SHAREDLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the build of tests and samples.
FLATBUFFERS_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the code coverage build option.
FLATBUFFERS_CODE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Add '-fsanitize' flags to 'flattests' and 'flatc' targets.
FLATBUFFERS_CODE_SANITIZE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable precompile headers support for 'flatbuffers' and 'flatc'.
// "
//\n        Only work if CMake supports 'target_precompile_headers'.
// "
//\n        This can speed up compilation time.
FLATBUFFERS_ENABLE_PCH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the installation of targets.
FLATBUFFERS_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Force libc++ when using Clang
FLATBUFFERS_LIBCXX_WITH_CLANG:BOOL=ON

//Build an deb using the 'package' target.
FLATBUFFERS_PACKAGE_DEBIAN:BOOL=OFF

//Build an rpm using the 'package' target.
FLATBUFFERS_PACKAGE_REDHAT:BOOL=OFF

//Flatbuffers project dir
FLATBUFFERS_PROJECT_DIR:STRING=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/flatbuffers

//Skip generating monster_extra.fbs that contains non-supported
// numerical"
//\n      types.
FLATBUFFERS_SKIP_MONSTER_EXTRA:BOOL=OFF

//Build flatbuffers compiler with -static flag
FLATBUFFERS_STATIC_FLATC:BOOL=OFF

//Build flatbuffers with all warnings as errors (-Werror or /WX).
FLATBUFFERS_STRICT_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Flatc installation directory
FLATC_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=<INSTALL_DIR>

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
FP16_SOURCE_DIR:UNINITIALIZED=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/fp16

FXDIV_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

FXDIV_SOURCE_DIR:UNINITIALIZED=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/fxdiv

//Allow use of inline assembly in FXdiv
FXDIV_USE_INLINE_ASSEMBLY:BOOL=OFF

FXdiv_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

FXdiv_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/fxdiv

FlatBuffers_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
FlatBuffers_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/flatbuffers

GEMMLOWP_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/gemmlowp

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//The directory relative to CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX where Eigen header
// files are installed
INCLUDE_INSTALL_DIR:PATH=include/eigen3

//Path to a library.
LIBM:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libm.so

//Source directory for the CMake project.
ML_DTYPES_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/ml_dtypes

//The directory relative to CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX where eigen3.pc
// is installed
PKGCONFIG_INSTALL_DIR:PATH=share/pkgconfig

//Enable deprecated API functions
PTHREADPOOL_ALLOW_DEPRECATED_API:BOOL=OFF

PTHREADPOOL_BUILD_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

PTHREADPOOL_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable fast path using atomic decrement instead of atomic compare-and-swap
PTHREADPOOL_ENABLE_FASTPATH:BOOL=OFF

//Type of library (shared, static, or default) to build
PTHREADPOOL_LIBRARY_TYPE:STRING=default

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
PTHREADPOOL_SOURCE_DIR:UNINITIALIZED=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/pthreadpool

//Synchronization primitive (condvar, futex, or default) for worker
// threads
PTHREADPOOL_SYNC_PRIMITIVE:STRING=default

//Enable install rule
RUY_ENABLE_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Use find_package to find cpuinfo
RUY_FIND_CPUINFO:BOOL=OFF

//Disable ruy's tests, examples, etc. Build only ruy public libraries.
RUY_MINIMAL_BUILD:BOOL=ON

//Enable ruy's built-in profiler (harms performance)
RUY_PROFILER:BOOL=OFF

//RUY source directory
RUY_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/ruy

//Directory that contains the TensorFlow project
TENSORFLOW_SOURCE_DIR:PATH=

//Enable External Delegate backend
TFLITE_ENABLE_EXTERNAL_DELEGATE:BOOL=ON

//Enable GPU
TFLITE_ENABLE_GPU:BOOL=OFF

//Enable install rule
TFLITE_ENABLE_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Enable label_image example
TFLITE_ENABLE_LABEL_IMAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Metal delegate (iOS only)
TFLITE_ENABLE_METAL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MMAP (unsupported on Windows)
TFLITE_ENABLE_MMAP:BOOL=ON

//Enable NNAPI (Android only).
TFLITE_ENABLE_NNAPI:BOOL=ON

//Enable NNAPI verbose validation.
TFLITE_ENABLE_NNAPI_VERBOSE_VALIDATION:BOOL=OFF

//Enable experimental support for resources
TFLITE_ENABLE_RESOURCE:BOOL=ON

//Enable experimental RUY integration
TFLITE_ENABLE_RUY:BOOL=ON

//Enable XNNPACK backend
TFLITE_ENABLE_XNNPACK:BOOL=ON

//Enable tflite kernel unit test
TFLITE_KERNEL_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//Use _GNU_SOURCE macro
USE_GNU_SOURCE:BOOL=OFF

//Use system Google Benchmark library instead of downloading and
// building it
USE_SYSTEM_GOOGLEBENCHMARK:BOOL=OFF

//Use system Google Test library instead of downloading and building
// it
USE_SYSTEM_GOOGLETEST:BOOL=OFF

//Use system libraries instead of downloading and building them
USE_SYSTEM_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
XNNPACK_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/_deps/xnnpack-build

//Builds all XNNPACK Microkernels
XNNPACK_BUILD_ALL_MICROKERNELS:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK benchmarks
XNNPACK_BUILD_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=OFF

//Build XNNPACK library
XNNPACK_BUILD_LIBRARY:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK unit tests
XNNPACK_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build XNNPACK with libm, can turn off on Windows to avoid mutiple
// math functions issue.
XNNPACK_BUILD_WITH_LIBM:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM BF16 (BFLOAT16) micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_BF16:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM DotProd (integer dot product) micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_DOTPROD:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM FP16 (FP16 data processing) scalar micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_FP16_SCALAR:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM FP16 (FP16 data processing) vector micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_FP16_VECTOR:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM I8MM (8-bit integer matrix multiply accumulate)
// micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_I8MM:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM SME micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_SME:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with ARM SME2 micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ARM_SME2:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with assembly micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_ASSEMBLY:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX256SKX micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX256SKX:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX256VNNI micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX256VNNI:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX256VNNIGFNI micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX256VNNIGFNI:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512-AMX micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512AMX:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512-BF16 micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512BF16:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512F micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512F:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512-FP16 micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512FP16:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512SKX micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512SKX:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512VBMI micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512VBMI:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512VNNI micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512VNNI:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX512VNNIGFNI micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVX512VNNIGFNI:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX-VNNI micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVXVNNI:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with AVX-VNNI-INT8 micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_AVXVNNIINT8:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with DWCONV multipass microkernels enabled
XNNPACK_ENABLE_DWCONV_MULTIPASS:BOOL=OFF

//Build XNNPACK with support for selecting microkernel with different
// MR
XNNPACK_ENABLE_GEMM_M_SPECIALIZATION:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with Hexagon HVX micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_HVX:BOOL=ON

//Use KleidiAI GEMM microkernels for Arm
XNNPACK_ENABLE_KLEIDIAI:BOOL=OFF

//Build XNNPACK with optimized memory allocation scheme
XNNPACK_ENABLE_MEMOPT:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with RISC-V Vector micro-kernels
XNNPACK_ENABLE_RISCV_VECTOR:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with graph rewriting for sparse inference
XNNPACK_ENABLE_SPARSE:BOOL=ON

//Build XNNPACK with VSX Vector micro-kernels for Power
XNNPACK_ENABLE_VSX:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
XNNPACK_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Type of library (shared, static, or default) to build
XNNPACK_LIBRARY_TYPE:STRING=default

//Value Computed by CMake
XNNPACK_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/xnnpack

//Use system-provided dependency libraries
XNNPACK_USE_SYSTEM_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//cpuinfo license file
_cpuinfo_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/cpuinfo/LICENSE

//farmhash license file
_farmhash_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/farmhash/COPYING

//flatbuffers license file
_flatbuffers_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/flatbuffers/LICENSE

//gemmlowp license file
_gemmlowp_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/gemmlowp/LICENSE

//ml_dtypes license file
_ml_dtypes_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/ml_dtypes/LICENSE

//protobuf license file
_protobuf_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/protobuf/LICENSE

//ruy license file
_ruy_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/ruy/LICENSE

//xnnpack license file
_xnnpack_LICENSE_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/xnnpack/LICENSE

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
absl_DIR:UNINITIALIZED=/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib/cmake/absl

cpuinfo_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/_deps/cpuinfo-build

//Value Computed by CMake
cpuinfo_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
cpuinfo_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/cpuinfo

//Value Computed by CMake

//Value Computed by CMake

libprotoc_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;libprotobuf;

//Value Computed by CMake
ml_dtypes_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/_deps/ml_dtypes-build

//Value Computed by CMake

protobuf_ABSL_PROVIDER:STRING=package

//Value Computed by CMake
protobuf_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/_deps/protobuf-build

//Build conformance tests
protobuf_BUILD_CONFORMANCE:BOOL=OFF

//Build examples
protobuf_BUILD_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Build libprotoc
protobuf_BUILD_LIBPROTOC:BOOL=OFF

//Build libprotoc and protoc compiler
protobuf_BUILD_PROTOC_BINARIES:BOOL=ON

//Build Shared Libraries
protobuf_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
protobuf_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Default debug postfix
protobuf_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=d

//Remove runtime type information in the binaries
protobuf_DISABLE_RTTI:BOOL=OFF

//Install protobuf binaries and files
protobuf_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
protobuf_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//CMake built-in FindProtobuf.cmake module compatible
protobuf_MODULE_COMPATIBLE:BOOL=OFF

//Link static runtime libraries
protobuf_MSVC_STATIC_RUNTIME:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
protobuf_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/pi/Aurore/deps/tensorflow/tensorflow/lite/build_shared/protobuf

//Enable for verbose output
protobuf_VERBOSE:BOOL=OFF

//Build with zlib support
protobuf_WITH_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF
